content.json:
## Performance Dashboard
Track operation speed and reliability SLAs.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "queryEditor.queryCompleted"
| where tostring(customDimensions.result) == "success"
| extend duration = toint(customMeasurements.durationMs)
| summarize P50 = percentile(duration, 50), P95 = percentile(duration, 95), P99 = percentile(duration, 99), Avg = avg(duration), Count = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Query Performance Trends (P50/P95/P99)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "ragChat.requestCompleted"
| where tostring(customDimensions.result) == "success"
| extend duration = toint(customMeasurements.durationMs)
| summarize percentile(duration, 50), percentile(duration, 95), percentile(duration, 99), count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| render timechart
content.title: RAG Chat Latency Distribution

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "connection.connectCompleted"
| summarize Success = countif(tostring(customDimensions.result) == "success"), Failure = countif(tostring(customDimensions.result) == "failure"), Total = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| extend SuccessRate = round(100.0 * Success / Total, 2)
| project timestamp, SuccessRate, Failure
| render timechart
content.title: Connection Success Rate

content.query:
customEvents
| where toint(customMeasurements.durationMs) > 10000
| extend duration = toint(customMeasurements.durationMs)
| project timestamp, name, duration, result = tostring(customDimensions.result)
| order by duration desc
| take 100
content.title: Slow Operations (>10s)
